prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 mixed live-action and manga portrait showing an East Asian young woman taking a mirror-style selfie while her manga counterpart appears behind and around her. The real woman is on the lower right half of the frame in three-quarter side profile, holding a dark blue smartphone at the lower left edge with one hand visible. She has black hair tied into a low messy bun with a large black claw clip, loose wispy bangs and flyaway strands, a visible ear, natural skin, and a calm introspective expression. She wears a fitted black V-neck cardigan or knit top with long sleeves. Behind her, fill the background with a huge black-and-white manga illustration of the same woman in matching side profile, matching bun, hair clip, long neck, V-neck top, and delicate linework, scaled so the manga head and hair dominate the upper and left areas. Add a comic contact-sheet border across the top and right side: exactly 7 small manga portrait panels total, each showing the same woman from slightly different side angles with the same hairstyle and outfit; arrange 5 rectangular panels in a horizontal row across the top and 2 smaller panels stacked vertically on the right. Use clean white background, thin black panel borders, detailed ink hatching, high-contrast monochrome manga lines, and subtle halftone texture. Blend the real subject and illustrated background so they align visually, as if the woman is taking a selfie in front of her own manga character sheet and the real and drawn versions share the same identity. Keep the composition bright and minimal, with no text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated beauty retouching, and realistic East Asian facial proportions. Use natural smartphone selfie realism for the live-action part and delicate black-and-white shojo manga ink drawing for the illustrated part.
